briefs.title: Restricted Insurance Agent Licence Rules Take Effect January 2027 for BC Businesses Selling Insurance
briefs.summary: Starting January 1, 2027, BC businesses that sell certain types of insurance — such as credit protection, cargo, warranty, or funeral insurance — must hold a Restricted Insurance Agent Licence under new rules made under the Financial Institutions Act.
briefs.action_required: Check if your business sells any restricted insurance type and prepare to obtain a Restricted Insurance Agent Licence before January 1, 2027.

key_dates.label: BC Restricted Insurance Agent Licence Regulation takes effect
